message:
Last winter, we faced a surprise snowstorm that caught everyone off guard. I remember waking up to a world wrapped in white, with the forecast showing no signs of stopping. My first thought? Panic about how to keep my little ones entertained while we were snowed in. 

But then I remembered my stash of board games and craft supplies—little treasures I had tucked away for a rainy (or snowy) day. We spent the whole afternoon building a blanket fort and diving into a game marathon, laughter echoing through the house. 

That small win of being prepared turned what could have been a dreary day into a cozy family adventure. It reminded me that sometimes, a little planning can lead to unexpected joy. 

Have you ever had a moment where being prepared turned the day around for you?
